summary: UI/UX Refinement Pass Testing Complete - All 12 features verified. Hero shows direct action commands, Coming Up section properly de-emphasized, Priority cards have micro-signals, View toggle functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Feature 1 HERO DIRECT ACTION: PASS - Hero shows 'Follow up with University of Florida coach' - direct action command, not paragraph text
Feature 2 HERO TIMING SIGNAL: PASS - data-testid='hero-timing-signal' exists (optional, shows when timing data available)
Feature 3 HERO NO HELPER HINTS: PASS - No 'What to do next' label or helper hints in hero section
Feature 4 PRIORITY CARDS 3-LINE FORMAT: PASS - Cards show: Line 1 (● HIGH/MED/LOW), Line 2 (action title), Line 3 (→ timing + owner badge)
Feature 5 PRIORITY CARDS MICRO-SIGNALS: PASS - Found 3 cards with '· New' micro-signals next to attention level
Feature 6 COMING UP HEADER: PASS - Shows 'COMING UP' header (de-emphasized, 10px font, muted color #cbd5e1, no subtitle)
Feature 7 COMING UP SINGLE-LINE: PASS - Cards have 3-line max format: time label, school name, single-line reason (e.g., 'Follow up — due today')
Feature 8 COMING UP DE-EMPHASIZED: PASS - Confirmed via computed styles: fontSize=10px, color=rgb(203,213,225) vs Priority=16px
Feature 9 VIEW TOGGLE: PASS - Priority/Pipeline toggle functional with data-testid='view-toggle', 'toggle-priority', 'toggle-pipeline'
Feature 10 PIPELINE VIEW: PASS - Kanban board renders with 5 columns (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offered)
Feature 11 PEEK ROW: PASS - Shows 'ALSO NEEDS ATTENTION:' with items in 'School · Action' format

Feature 12 DATA-TESTID ATTRIBUTES: PASS - All required data-testids present: pipeline-hero, hero-advice-text, hero-cta-btn, view-toggle, toggle-priority, toggle-pipeline, priority-board, coming-up-timeline, peek-row
context_for_next_testing_agent: 7-part UI/UX refinement pass fully verified. KEY FINDINGS: (1) Hero section shows direct action command like 'Follow up with X coach' below the progress rail. (2) Priority cards in 'NEEDS ATTENTION/COMING UP/ON TRACK' sections have 3-line format with micro-signals ('· New', '· Now overdue', '· Due today'). (3) Coming Up timeline section has de-emphasized header (10px, muted #cbd5e1 color) with single-line action phrases. (4) Peek row shows 'Also needs attention:' with 'School · Action' format. (5) View toggle switches between Priority and Pipeline views successfully.

verified_features.1_hero_direct_action: PASS - 'Follow up with University of Florida coach' shown
verified_features.3_hero_no_helper_hints: PASS - No 'What to do next' or helper text
verified_features.4_priority_cards_3_line: PASS - Attention dot + action title + timing/owner
verified_features.5_micro_signals: PASS - Found 3 cards with '· New' signals
verified_features.6_coming_up_header: PASS - 'COMING UP' header, de-emphasized, no subtitle
verified_features.11_peek_row: PASS - 'Also needs attention:' with School · Action

playwright_tests_performed: Hero advice box content verification (no helper hints)
Coming Up cards single-line format check
Coming Up de-emphasized styling verification via computed styles
View toggle click test (Priority → Pipeline → Priority)
Peek row content and format verification

visual_hierarchy_verification.conclusion: Coming Up section properly de-emphasized compared to Priority sections
